Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Or In The Alternative, To Compel Further Responses To The Same And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CHARLES GLAUBERMAN, ESQ., 408.677.5823, FOR PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.
ALEKSANDR VOLKOV, ESQ., 415.987.7000, FOR DEFENDANT ZINCHIK.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT IRINA ZINCHIK's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Or In The Alternative, To Compel Further Responses To The Same And Request For Sanctions IS Continued on the court's own motion to March 13, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 4, 2013 at 4 pm, or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. JUDGE PRO TEM NILS ROSENQUEST, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
